summary: Attendance Tracking feature testing completed successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed. Full UI verification completed: Daily Entry tab with date navigation, status selection, time inputs, auto-fill times, Save All functionality, and Monthly Report tab with employee summary.

issues: Auto-fill times only triggers when check_in is empty - changing from Present to Half Day doesn't update check_out time (expected behavior per code, but could be improved for UX)
Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) - existing minor UX issue, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created attendance records for dates 2026-03-01 through 2026-03-08 with various statuses (present, half_day, late, absent, on_leave). UI test saved Half Day attendance for 2026-03-10.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance Tracking feature fully functional at /attendance. Constants: FULL_DAY_HOURS=9, HALF_DAY_HOURS=5, STANDARD_WORK_HOURS=8. Backend endpoints tested: GET /attendance/settings, GET /attendance/daily/{date}, POST /attendance, POST /attendance/bulk, GET /attendance/summary/{employee_id}, GET /attendance/monthly-report. Existing attendance for John Doe (EMP0001) on 2026-03-08: Present, 08:00-17:30, 9.5h, 1.5h weekend OT.

Daily Entry Tab.weekend_indicator: PASS - 'Weekend (1.5x OT rate)' shown for Sunday

Daily Entry Tab.status_dropdown: PASS - Options: Present, Absent, Half Day, Late, On Leave
Daily Entry Tab.time_inputs: PASS - Check In/Out inputs with time picker
Daily Entry Tab.save_button: PASS - Saves attendance for modified employees

Monthly Report Tab.department_filter: PASS - Dropdown with All Departments option
Monthly Report Tab.report_table: PASS - Columns: Employee, Dept, Present, Half Day, Absent, Late, Leave, Work Days, Total Hrs, OT Hrs
Monthly Report Tab.totals_row: PASS - Footer shows sum of all values

API Endpoints.GET /payroll/attendance/daily/{date}: PASS - Returns all employees with attendance

API Endpoints.POST /payroll/attendance/bulk: PASS - Bulk save for multiple employees
